description: Correctly configured manufacturing database. The database is private, encrypted, and backups are enabled.
business_context: Stores manufacturing production records, process logs, and operational database information.

description: Manufacturing database is private, but encryption is disabled. It is not publicly reachable, but does not fully meet the professional security baseline.
business_context: Stores quality inspection results, defect records, and production audit data.

description: Dangerous RDS misconfiguration. The manufacturing database is publicly accessible from the internet.
business_context: Stores operational manufacturing data, machine records, and internal production database information.
